title: 想いの重さ＞砂糖の重さ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm shopping at the mall, I see Mejiro
Dober and Mejiro Ryan together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: How's that one taste?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's good. Everything we've tried has been tasty.
Could I have a moment before I decide?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sure! Take all the time you need. Why don't we
go try those samples next?
choice_data_list: Hey, you two. Doing some shopping?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... It's not really any of your business. I'm
just getting a gift for this lady I know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello Trainer. I received a gift from a lady I
know, so we're here to get her something in
return.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We decided to get her something sweet, but
everything's so yummy, we're having a tough time
deciding. Haha.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We decided to get her something sweet, but
everything's so yummy, we're having a tough time
deciding. Haha.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If we were looking for something that pairs well
with tea, I would've been able to choose
immediately, but I feel so indecisive...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's natural to fuss over a gift for someone you
care about, 'specially since you're so considerate
about others.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Me, considerate? What are you talking about?
You're just teasing, aren't you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we need to decide what to get. I
won't stop trying samples until I'm confident in my
choice!
choice_data_list: Well, just be careful you don't overdo it.
Well, just be careful you don't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we need to decide what to get. I
won't stop trying samples until I'm confident in my
choice!
choice_data_list: Well, just be careful you don't overdo it.
Well, just be careful you don't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... The last person I need lecturing me is you,
but I guess you're right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Y-you might be right... I've already eaten
a lot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How about we switch gears and forget about food
altogether, then? You can get her some cool
knickknacks or essential oils instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How about we switch gears and forget about food
altogether, then? You can get her some cool
knickknacks or essential oils instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I like that idea. Let's see what the shops have to
offer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they're able to avoid overeating and
manage to find a proper present.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All right! The perfect treat for her is sure to be
out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We still haven't checked out the macaron place,
the tart place, or the Japanese sweets place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. I want to compare them with the first
dessert we tried, so I'd like to circle back there,
actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! I'll come with! Let's find the best
dessert for her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Mejiro Dober manages to choose the
perfect treat... but ends up overeating.
